title: The Missed Connection Flight
content: After landing in Frankfurt, Ethan had only forty minutes to catch his connecting flight. At first, he thought that would be enough time, but his arriving flight was delayed by nearly half an hour. He rushed through the airport, following signs and checking departure screens repeatedly. By the time he reached the gate, the boarding door had already closed. Frustrated but calm, Ethan spoke with an airline employee who helped him book a seat on the next available flight. Although the delay changed his schedule, it also gave him a chance to explore part of the airport he had never seen before.
